title: Dance of the Dragons: Blood and Revenge #got #shorts
description: After the first death, the war escalated into something far darker. Revenge replaced reason, and the Dance of the Dragons became unstoppable. #ASOIAF #Targaryen #Shorts

scenes.narration: The first death started the war—but revenge is what made it unstoppable.
scenes.image_prompt: dark battlefield with flames rising as dragons circle above, intense atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: When news of the death spread, grief quickly turned into rage.
scenes.image_prompt: court reacting in shock and anger, emotional tension, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Both sides demanded justice—but what they truly wanted was retaliation.
scenes.image_prompt: leaders giving orders with intense expressions, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The war shifted overnight—from conflict to vengeance.
scenes.image_prompt: battle preparations intensifying under stormy sky, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Strikes became more brutal, targeting not just armies—but symbols of power and family.
scenes.image_prompt: dragonfire hitting castles and strongholds, destructive imagery, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Each attack led to another, creating a cycle that neither side could escape.
scenes.image_prompt: chain reaction of battles across map of Westeros, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Even dragonriders began to fall, proving that no one was safe in this war.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon rider falling from sky amid battle, tragic visual, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The destruction spread faster than anyone could control.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple regions burning simultaneously, chaos across land, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What began as a fight for the throne became a war that consumed everything.
scenes.image_prompt: battlefield filled with fire, dragons, and fallen armies, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because once revenge takes control, there is no path back—only destruction.
scenes.image_prompt: burning horizon with dragon silhouettes fading into smoke, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
